smoke.note: Cold-smoke: keep chamber below ~32°C/90°F (fat liquefies above), ideal 18-29°C. Firm cheese tolerates 2-4h for bold smoke. After smoking, vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow the acrid fresh-smoke edge.

smoke.ref: Hey Grill Hey — Smoked Cheese guide
smoke.note: Cold-smoke below ~32°C/90°F, ideal 18-29°C. Hard cheddar handles hickory 2-4h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated so the smoke settles from harsh to mellow.
Semi-soft pasta filata — keep chamber ≤28°C and time short (1-2h) so it does not soften/melt. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to balance the smoke.

smoke.ref: Hey Grill Hey — Smoked Cheese guide
smoke.note: Cold-smoke below ~32°C/90°F, ideal 18-29°C; semi-hard, 2-3h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to mellow.

smoke.ref: Smoked BBQ Source / Meat Church — Smoked Cream Cheese
smoke.note: EXCEPTION — HOT-smoked, not cold. Smoker 200-250°F (~107-121°C), block scored and rubbed, on parchment/pan 1.5-2h until gooey inside but not collapsed. Serve warm immediately; no long rest/age needed.
Cold-smoke below ~32°C/90°F, ideal 18-29°C, 2-3h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow the smoke.

smoke.ref: Hey Grill Hey — Smoked Cheese guide
smoke.note: Cold-smoke ≤28°C (below 32°C/90°F melt point), ~2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to develop flavor.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C, 2-3h for a firmer aged wheel. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C (below 90°F melt point), ~2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated so the smoke settles.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C, 2-3h for a hard alpine wheel. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C (below 90°F), ~2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to balance the smoke.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C, ~2h for a firm sheep's-milk wheel. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow.

smoke.ref: Hey Grill Hey — Smoked Cheese guide
smoke.note: Cold-smoke ≤28°C (below 90°F melt point), 1.5-2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated so the smoke mellows.

smoke.ref: Hey Grill Hey — Smoked Cheese guide
smoke.note: Cold-smoke ≤28°C, ~2h. Semi-hard, watch it does not sweat near 90°F. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow.

smoke.ref: Hey Grill Hey — Smoked Cheese guide
smoke.note: Cold-smoke ≤28°C (semi-soft, stay well below 90°F), ~2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to balance the smoke.

smoke.ref: Hey Grill Hey — Smoked Cheese guide
smoke.note: Cold-smoke ≤28°C (semi-soft, keep below 90°F), ~2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow.
Soft/creamy — keep chamber ≤28°C and time short (1.5h) so it does not slump. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to mellow.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C (below 90°F), ~2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow.
Very hard grating cheese — cold-smoke ≤28°C, 2-3h absorbs smoke slowly. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to mellow.
Semi-soft, low melt point — keep ≤28°C and 1.5-2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow.
Semi-soft — keep ≤28°C and 1.5-2h so it does not soften. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to balance the smoke.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C (below 90°F), ~2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C, ~2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated so the smoke settles.
Firm French wheel — cold-smoke ≤28°C, 2-3h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C, ~2h; mild fruit wood suits the strong paste. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to mellow.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C, up to 3h for a dense blue. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow.
Creamy blue — keep ≤28°C and ~2h so it does not soften. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to balance the smoke.
Cold-smoke ≤28°C, ~2h. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks in the fridge to mellow the smoke.
Soft, moist sheep's-milk blue — keep ≤28°C and 1.5-2h so it does not weep. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to mellow.

smoke.ref: Homemade & Yummy / TheOnlineGrill — cold smoking soft cheese
smoke.note: Fresh high-moisture mozzarella-style — softest here; keep chamber ≤25°C and time short (1-1.5h) so it does not melt/weep. Pat dry first. Vacuum-seal and rest 1-2 weeks refrigerated to mellow.
Soft bloomy-rind — keep chamber ≤25°C and very short (30-60 min); high moisture and rind mean smoke turns bitter fast. Wrap/vacuum-seal and rest ~1 week in the fridge; eat sooner than hard cheeses.

smoke.ref: Homemade & Yummy — Cold Smoked soft cheese
smoke.note: Soft bloomy-rind like brie — keep chamber ≤25°C and 30-60 min only; over-smoking goes acrid. Wrap/vacuum-seal and rest ~1 week refrigerated to mellow.
EXCEPTION — not smoked. Halloumi is a high-melt-point grilling cheese; grill direct over high heat 2-3 min per side to golden grill marks. Serve immediately (turns rubbery when cold). No rest/age.

grill.ref: Love and Lemons / Kitchen Treaty — Grilled Halloumi
grill.note: Slice ~1.5cm planks, brush with oil, grill grate high/medium-high (~230-250°C), 2-3 min per side undisturbed until it releases with golden grill marks. Total ~5-6 min. Serve hot straight off the grill.
